Sentence_3_PT: Um bom vendedor é educado e prestativo.
Collocations: sales assistant; shop assistant; helpful assistant
Oral_Question: When do you ask a sales assistant for help?
Model_Answer: I ask when I can't find my size or need information.

Sentence_1_EN: This jacket was on sale.
Sentence_1_PT: Esta jaqueta estava em promoção.
Sentence_2_EN: I bought the shoes because they were on sale.
Sentence_2_PT: Comprei os sapatos porque estavam em promoção.
Sentence_3_EN: The store has a big sale this weekend.
Sentence_3_PT: A loja tem uma grande promoção neste fim de semana.
Collocations: on sale; big sale; summer sale
Oral_Question: Do you like buying things on sale?
Model_Answer: Yes, I like buying things on sale because I can save money.

Sentence_1_EN: They gave me a 20 percent discount.
Sentence_1_PT: Eles me deram um desconto de 20 por cento.
Sentence_2_EN: I asked for a discount, but they said no.
Sentence_2_PT: Pedi um desconto, mas eles disseram não.
Sentence_3_EN: This store offers a student discount.
Sentence_3_PT: Esta loja oferece desconto para estudantes.
Collocations: get a discount; ask for a discount; student discount
Oral_Question: Do you usually ask for a discount?
Model_Answer: Sometimes, especially when something is expensive.

Sentence_1_EN: The price is too high.
Sentence_1_PT: O preço está muito alto.
Sentence_2_EN: I always compare prices before buying.
Sentence_2_PT: Eu sempre comparo preços antes de comprar.
Sentence_3_EN: The price includes delivery.
Sentence_3_PT: O preço inclui entrega.
Collocations: high price; fair price; compare prices
Oral_Question: Do you compare prices before buying?
Model_Answer: Yes, I usually compare prices online before buying.

Sentence_1_EN: I always keep the receipt.
Sentence_1_PT: Eu sempre guardo o recibo.
Sentence_2_EN: The cashier forgot to give me the receipt.
Sentence_2_PT: O caixa esqueceu de me dar o recibo.
Sentence_3_EN: You need the receipt if you want a refund.
Sentence_3_PT: Você precisa do recibo se quiser um reembolso.
Collocations: keep the receipt; lose the receipt; receipt number
Oral_Question: Do you usually keep receipts?
Model_Answer: Yes, I keep receipts for expensive products.

Sentence_1_EN: I asked for a refund because the product was broken.
Sentence_1_PT: Pedi reembolso porque o produto estava quebrado.
Sentence_2_EN: The store gave me a full refund.
Sentence_2_PT: A loja me deu um reembolso total.
Sentence_3_EN: You need the receipt to get a refund.
Sentence_3_PT: Você precisa do recibo para conseguir reembolso.
Collocations: ask for a refund; get a refund; full refund
Oral_Question: Have you ever asked for a refund?
Model_Answer: Yes, I asked for a refund when a product didn't work.

Sentence_1_EN: This was a good purchase.
Sentence_1_PT: Esta foi uma boa compra.
Sentence_2_EN: I regretted the purchase after one week.
Sentence_2_PT: Arrependi-me da compra depois de uma semana.
Sentence_3_EN: Online purchases are very common now.
Sentence_3_PT: Compras online são muito comuns agora.
Collocations: make a purchase; online purchase; expensive purchase
Oral_Question: What was your last purchase?
Model_Answer: My last purchase was something for my house.

Sentence_1_EN: Can I try on this jacket?
Sentence_1_PT: Posso experimentar esta jaqueta?
Sentence_2_EN: She tried on three dresses.
Sentence_2_PT: Ela experimentou três vestidos.
Sentence_3_EN: I always try on shoes before buying them.
Sentence_3_PT: Eu sempre experimento sapatos antes de comprá-los.
Collocations: try on clothes; try on shoes; try it on
Oral_Question: Do you try on clothes before buying them?
Model_Answer: Yes, I usually try on clothes to check the size.

Sentence_1_EN: The fitting room is over there.
Sentence_1_PT: O provador fica ali.
Sentence_2_EN: I waited outside the fitting room.
Sentence_2_PT: Esperei do lado de fora do provador.
Sentence_3_EN: The fitting room was busy.
Sentence_3_PT: O provador estava ocupado.
Collocations: fitting room; changing room; fitting room line
Oral_Question: Where do you try on clothes?
Model_Answer: I try on clothes in the fitting room.

Sentence_1_EN: We went window shopping downtown.
Sentence_1_PT: Fomos olhar vitrines no centro.
Sentence_2_EN: Window shopping is fun when you don't want to spend money.
Sentence_2_PT: Olhar vitrines é divertido quando você não quer gastar dinheiro.
Sentence_3_EN: I was just window shopping, but I bought a shirt.
Sentence_3_PT: Eu estava só olhando vitrines, mas comprei uma camisa.
Collocations: go window shopping; just looking; store window
Oral_Question: Do you like window shopping?
Model_Answer: Sometimes. I like looking around without pressure to buy.

Front: Pay in cash or by credit card
Sentence_1_EN: You can pay in cash or by credit card.
Sentence_1_PT: Você pode pagar em dinheiro ou com cartão de crédito.
Sentence_2_EN: I prefer to pay by credit card.
Sentence_2_PT: Prefiro pagar com cartão de crédito.
Sentence_3_EN: Some small shops only accept cash.
Sentence_3_PT: Algumas lojas pequenas só aceitam dinheiro.
Collocations: pay in cash; pay by credit card; accept cash
Oral_Question: Do you usually pay in cash or by credit card?
Model_Answer: I usually pay by credit card.

Sentence_1_EN: The tickets were sold out.
Sentence_1_PT: Os ingressos estavam esgotados.
Sentence_2_EN: The shirt I wanted was sold out in my size.
Sentence_2_PT: A camisa que eu queria estava esgotada no meu tamanho.
Sentence_3_EN: By the time we arrived, everything was sold out.
Sentence_3_PT: Quando chegamos, tudo já estava esgotado.
Collocations: sold out tickets; sold out size; completely sold out
Oral_Question: Have you ever wanted something that was sold out?
Model_Answer: Yes, I wanted to buy a shirt, but it was sold out.
